description: Petrol stations on main roads where the supervising adult guides a parked vehicle check — tyre pressures, windscreen washer fluid, and basic under-bonnet awareness. Unlocks practical skills every learner should know before driving solo.

legal.notes: All checks happen with the engine off and the car parked in a designated bay. Supervisor performs or closely supervises any under-bonnet work. Not a substitute for a professional service.

unlock_rules.notes: Visit unlocks a guided checklist. Supervisor ticks off each item after the learner completes it (or assists safely).

checklist_modules.name: Tyre pressure check
checklist_modules.description: Locate recommended PSI on the door jamb sticker. Use the servo air hose to check all four tyres (and spare if accessible).

checklist_modules.name: Windscreen washer fluid
checklist_modules.description: Open bonnet (supervisor assist). Locate washer reservoir; top up with water or washer fluid from the servo shop.

checklist_modules.name: Tyre tread and condition
checklist_modules.description: Check tread depth (wear bars) and look for cuts, bulges, or uneven wear on all four tyres.

checklist_modules.name: Wipers and lights walk-around
checklist_modules.description: Test wipers and washer spray. Walk around the car and verify headlights, tail-lights, and indicators with the supervisor.

checklist_modules.name: Oil level (dipstick basics)
checklist_modules.description: Engine off, car level. Supervisor guides locating the dipstick, reading the level between marks. Top-up only if supervisor agrees.

combo_badges.name: Three Servos
combo_badges.description: Complete at least one checklist module at three different stations.

stations.name: BP Rose Bay
stations.description: New South Head Road servo beside Crystal Car Wash — air hose and shop for washer fluid.
stations.supervisor_notes: Enter forecourt slowly; practise positioning next to the air pump bay.
stations.street_address: 777 New South Head Road, Rose Bay NSW 2029

stations.name: Ampol Double Bay
stations.description: Oxford Street forecourt — busy harbour-strip servo with air and convenience shop.
stations.supervisor_notes: Oxford Street traffic from the west; practise merging into the servo entrance.
stations.street_address: 536 New South Head Road, Double Bay NSW 2028

stations.name: Shell Bondi Junction
stations.description: Oxford Street / Syd Einfeld Drive area — high-traffic inner-east servo.
stations.supervisor_notes: Multi-lane approach; not for first lessons. Good for confident learners.

stations.name: Ampol Randwick
stations.description: Avoca Street servo near the Randwick civic centre — calmer than Oxford Street.
stations.supervisor_notes: Good first servo visit for tyre-pressure module.

stations.name: Metro Petroleum Maroubra
stations.description: Anzac Parade coastal-corridor servo — pairs with Maroubra beach lessons.
stations.supervisor_notes: Anzac Parade is a major arterial; practise lane changes before turning in.

stations.name: 7-Eleven Coogee
stations.description: Coogee Bay Road fuel and convenience — washer fluid in store, air out front.
stations.supervisor_notes: Beach traffic on weekends; weekday mornings are quieter.

stations.name: Ampol Kingsford
stations.description: Anzac Parade near UNSW — busy student-corridor servo.
stations.supervisor_notes: Heavy bus and student pedestrian traffic nearby.

stations.name: BP Rushcutters Bay
stations.description: New South Head Road near Rushcutters Bay Park — harbour-side servo.
stations.supervisor_notes: Pair with Rushcutters Bay park visit or Crystal Car Wash Rushcutters Bay.
stations.street_address: 100 New South Head Road, Rushcutters Bay NSW 2011
